681.one_line_summary: URL format for payment requests and transactions using ethereum: scheme.
681.notes: Supersedes ERC-67. Uses scientific notation for amounts similar to Bitcoin payment URLs.

721.one_line_summary: Standard interface for non-fungible tokens with transfer and ownership tracking.
721.notes: Core NFT standard. Optional metadata extension and enumeration extension. Inspired by ERC-20.

725.one_line_summary: Generic data key/value store and execution interface for smart contract accounts.
725.notes: Two sub-standards: ERC725X (execution) and ERC725Y (data storage). Building blocks for smart contract accounts and upgradable metadata.

777.one_line_summary: Token standard with send/receive hooks, operators, and ERC-20 backward compatibility.
777.notes: Uses ERC-1820 registry for hooks. Operators allow delegated sending. Backward compatible with ERC-20.

801.one_line_summary: Standard interface for canary contracts to signal state (alive/dead).
801.notes: Stagnant status. Used for warrant canaries and status signaling. Minimal specification.

820.one_line_summary: Pseudo-introspection registry for interface implementation discovery.
820.notes: Superseded by ERC-1820. Allows any address to register interfaces. Compatible with ERC-165.

823.one_line_summary: Token exchange standard enabling cross-token swaps and payments.
823.notes: Extends ERC-20 with exchange services. Preserves exchanged tokens in contract rather than destroying them.

831.one_line_summary: URI format container for Ethereum use-cases with optional prefixes.
831.notes: Generalizes ERC-67 and ERC-681. Uses 'eth:' or 'ethereum:' scheme with extensible prefix system.

838.one_line_summary: ABI specification for typed errors in REVERT reason strings.
838.notes: Draft status. Extends ABI to include error declarations with parameters. Enables error parsing by clients.

875.one_line_summary: Simplified NFT standard with batch transfers and atomic p2p swaps.
875.notes: Withdrawn status. Allows transferring multiple tokens in one transaction. Includes p2p atomic swap functionality.

884.one_line_summary: ERC-20 compatible token for Delaware corporate shares with KYC/AML support.
884.notes: Complies with Delaware General Corporations Law. Requires identity verification. Tracks shareholders and transfer history.

897.one_line_summary: Standard interface for proxy contracts to signal implementation address.
897.notes: Stagnant status. Distinguishes forwarding vs upgradeable proxies. Enables source code verification on explorers.

900.one_line_summary: Simple staking interface for token staking systems.
900.notes: Optional history functions for historical stake tracking. Common interface for staking protocols.

902.one_line_summary: Token validation protocol for authorization and compliance checks.
902.notes: Uses ERC-1066 status codes. Enables KYC/AML and transfer restrictions without per-token whitelists.

918.one_line_summary: Mineable token standard using Proof of Work for distribution.
918.notes: Includes delegated minting and merged mining extensions. Alternative to ICO distribution model.
